Outreach Generator

Generate CPTWEBS sales copy based on the lead score, website issues, offer, and free mockup pitch.

Score 94/100 • Hot • outdated design, missing online giving

Cold email

Subject: Quick website idea for Grace Community Church 1 Hi Grace Community Church 1, I noticed your current website could be doing more to help visitors take action. A few things stood out: outdated design, missing online giving. CPTWEBS helps churches launch modern mobile-ready websites in 5-7 days. Church website: $99 setup + $99/month with giving, sermons, events, ministries, and 5-7 day launch. We can also create a free homepage mockup so you can see the upgrade before deciding. Would you be open to taking a look?

SMS

Hi Grace Community Church 1, this is CPTWEBS. I noticed a few website opportunities: outdated design, missing online giving. We build modern sites in 5-7 days and can show a free homepage mockup.

Phone script

Opening: I am calling from CPTWEBS because I noticed your website may be missing key conversion features. Mention: outdated design, missing online giving. Offer a free homepage mockup and ask who handles website updates.

Follow-up

Hi Grace Community Church 1, following up on the website idea. CPTWEBS can help modernize the site in 5-7 days and include the features visitors expect. Want me to send the free homepage mockup?

Website audit summary

Audit summary for Grace Community Church 1: score 94/100. Priority: Hot. Main opportunities: outdated design, missing online giving. Recommended offer: Church website: $99 setup + $99/month with giving, sermons, events, ministries, and 5-7 day launch.
